problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to and, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
